Product.title: Product
Product.description: A product being tracked for price comparison.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this product.

stores.description: List of stores where the product is tracked.

cheapestStore.description: The name of the store with the lowest price.

priceHistory.description: History of the cheapest price over time.

/users/{userId}/products/{productId}.description: Collection of products tracked by a specific user.
